title: vitis sinocinerea
intro: Vitis sinocinerea, also known as Chinese grapevine, is a plant species within the grape family (Vitaceae) native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitis sinocinerea include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Vitis sinocinerea is often used in teas, infusions, and dried forms, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceuticals for various health applications.
